items.title: Resolve the reviewed under-$20K page release candidate
items.baseline: At commit c87e291, the already built and July 13 reviewed under-$20K candidate exists only as exact-path dirty work and is not part of repository history or the live site.
items.hypothesis: Capturing the unchanged, review-clean candidate in one exact-path commit will preserve the work and create a release-ready artifact without implying that it is already published or measured.
items.expected_effect: No traffic, indexing, or production effect before an authorized push and deployment; immediate effect is a reproducible reviewed commit for later release.
items.observation_window: Not started. If a later authorized release occurs, establish a URL-scoped observation window from the verified production deployment date.
items.decision: Create one independently reviewed, QA-green local commit and hold it without push or deployment through the July 19 proving-period review unless the user separately authorizes release.
items.success_signal: The already reviewed page is either captured in one exact-path, QA-green commit or a concrete blocking defect is recorded without rebuilding the page.
items.gsc_evidence_classification: unavailable; configured collection mode is authenticated-browser-or-readonly-api, with collected-at and data-through dates UNKNOWN; this release-capture action does not require fresh GSC
qa_evidence: git diff and untracked-path whitespace checks passed
required site and deployment files are present
HTML and sitemap XML parse checks passed
the single inline script passed node --check
all ten local links and fragments resolved
blank, complete-$20K, over-budget, and invalid-negative calculator states passed
desktop 1440x900, mobile 390x844, and narrow 320x740 browser QA passed without horizontal overflow or clipped controls
independent review cycle 3 returned PASS with no P0-P3 findings after release-state and cycle-history evidence fixes
items.result: This exact-path transaction preserves the already built candidate without rebuilding it, reconciles its operating handoffs to the proving-period commit-only policy, and captures the review-clean candidate atomically when committed. No push, deployment, production URL, indexing request, outreach, or external account changes in this transaction.
items.notes: The review-clean candidate is captured by this pending exact-path commit transaction. After commit, hold it locally: it must not be pushed or deployed without user approval through the July 19 proving-period review. Do not call the candidate live before a verified authorized release.

items.title: Refresh indexing and early search evidence for the live support cluster
items.success_signal: A fresh read-only snapshot identifies discovery, indexing, and any first relevant impressions without requesting indexing.
items.notes: Semrush is optional enrichment and must not block a GSC/public evidence refresh.

items.title: Choose the next buyer-protection tool from observed user and search evidence
items.success_signal: One bounded next tool or page is selected with evidence and explicit legal/source review gates.
items.notes: Do not scale location pages or add lead generation merely to maintain cadence.
